security.csp: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://huggingface.co https://*.hf.co https://github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; font-src 'self' data:; manifest-src 'self';

bundle.longDescription: Forge is a desktop application for orchestrating and running local AI models, supporting multiple inference engines including llama.cpp, vLLM, and LMDeploy.
